results.title: Moti Lal Vora’s wife’s ashes immersed at Sangam
results.description: Moti Lal Vora’s wife Shanti Devi Vora’s ashes were immersed at Prayagraj Sangam on Tuesday with Vedic chants and Hindu rituals; she died July 13.

results.title: BJP Slams Congress Leader Rahul Gandhi After Detention During Protest Near PM Modi's Residence Over NEET Issue
results.description: BJP President Nitin Nabin criticised Congress leaders after Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Gandhi Vadra and others were detained during a protest near PM Narendra Modi’s residence in New Delhi. The opposition was demanding a discussion on the NEET-UG issue and resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, while Parliament witnessed disruptions over the matter.
